channel.title: How to get more than 99 items. New endopoints
channel.description:
Hi, I'm developing a movie catalog and I want to take more than 99 items from wordpress. I've read that I have to make new endpoints or something like that.
Can anyone help me doing that?
This is the link by the moment: https://nicolasbava-memoriafp-default.layer0-limelight.link/

item.title: How to get more than 99 items. New endopoints
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
Hi, I’m developing a movie catalog and I want to take more than 99 items from wordpress. I’ve read that I have to make new endpoints or something like that.

Can anyone help me doing that?

This is the link by the moment:
https://nicolasbava-memoriafp-default.layer0-limelight.link/

Read full topic
item.source: How to get more than 99 items. New endopoints
